data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Thinking Detail defaults to off in both conversation history and terminal panel views. Shared visibility helpers now hide non-assistant history responses and stderr/detail terminal output until the toggle is enabled. Regression coverage includes history response visibility and terminal stream visibility. Validation rerun in /Users/cartine/foolery/work/foolery-d486: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
